name: World of Tanks Blitz
description: Welcome to World of Tanks Blitz, where you will experience the thrill of a real shooting game! Join a global community of millions of players, venture into your very first massive tank battle, engage in intense 7x7 combat, and emerge victorious! Immerse yourself in this online tank shooting game, where youll encounter a wide range of vehicles, maps, game modes, and countless strategic possibilities. Get ready for adrenaline-pumping tank clashes on an epic scale!
instructions: Slide to move your target and aim and tap to shoot your enemies
tags: 1 Player, Battlegrounds, Best, Fire, Kill, Mobile, Online, Shoot, Tank, Tanks, Timing, unity, War
